summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WashCare Pro washing machine repair website. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.

Hero section with Book Service and WhatsApp buttons
Services section shows 3 service cards (Repair, Installation, AMC)
Booking form integration - successful form submission
Payment section displays QR code correctly
Footer shows correct phone number (8310334978) and address (Barline Road, Hassa)
Floating WhatsApp button is visible and positioned correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI and integration tests passed)
